nodesDesc: Manage node detail, parent-child relationships and relay topology.
scopesDesc: Maintain shared scope master data for nodes, chains, routes, and groups.
chainsDesc: Edit hop ordering, validate scopes and preview compiled chain configuration.
routesDesc: Whitelist rules, match conditions and destination scopes.
accessPathsDesc: TCP, UDP, SOCKS, TLS passthrough, SSH and RDP entry rules.
certificatesDesc: Let’s Encrypt and internal certificate status.
